title: Junior Business Development Manager at Atul Projects

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Atul Projects
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Atul Projects in Jodhpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Atul Projects:
Atul Projects is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atul Projects!
